nav_explore_desc: Explore the docs, playground, and open-source packages.
hero_description: Turn Memos posts into polished, portable cards for docs, changelogs, marketing pages, and product surfaces.
hero_card_title: Copy a working embed in minutes
hero_card_desc: Start from the hosted playground, tune the output, and share the exact configuration with your team.
hero_card_why_title: Why teams keep the playground open
hero_card_why_1: Compare iframe, Web Component, and React output side-by-side.
hero_card_why_2: Share the full configuration in the URL for async reviews.
hero_card_why_3: Copy production-ready snippets instead of hand-writing params.
section_integration_title: Choose the integration that fits your stack
section_integration_desc: Start simple with an iframe, then graduate to a Web Component or React wrapper when you need tighter control.
integration_iframe_best: Docs, CMS pages, and no-build environments
integration_iframe_body: Host the embed route once and drop in responsive iframe markup anywhere.
integration_wc_best: Static sites, Astro, Eleventy, and progressive enhancement
integration_wc_body: Register a custom element and keep integration as simple as HTML attributes.
integration_react_best: Dashboards, product surfaces, and app shells
integration_react_body: Reach for the React wrapper when you want stateful configuration and callbacks.
section_why_desc: Designed for product updates, personal publishing, and internal docs that still need a production-ready presentation layer.
feature_beautiful_desc: Give memo cards a polished surface with themes, density presets, grouped reactions, and image previews.
feature_developer_desc: Start with an iframe, then move to a Web Component or React wrapper when you need tighter integration.
feature_performance_desc: Use shareable playground presets, lightweight rendering helpers, and auto-resizing embeds without custom glue code.
cta_title: Prototype fast, then ship with confidence
cta_desc: Open the playground to generate a shareable configuration, then use the docs to move that setup into production.
footer_desc: Use the hosted playground to tune your embed, then copy the iframe, Web Component, or React snippet that fits your stack.
footer_built_for: Built for blogs, changelogs, docs, and product updates.
